languages.text: "Согласно Уставу, первейшая обязанность гвардейца — помогать верным слугам Бога-Императора в борьбе с врагами Человечества и сохранить жизнь вышестоящего командования даже ценой собственной. А вы так или иначе {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}станете нашим командующим{/d}".

"According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."
languages.original_text: "Согласно Уставу, первейшая обязанность гвардейца — помогать верным слугам Бога-Императора в борьбе с врагами Человечества и сохранить жизнь вышестоящего командования даже ценой собственной. А вы так или иначе {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}станете нашим командующим{/d}".

traits.locale_text: "According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."

"According to the Code, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are to be our commander, after all."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. However, your position in the Imperium hierarchy is higher than his, given that no titles here carry the authorisation of the Departmento Munitorum. It is my duty as a servant of the God-Emperor to aid you in the fight against the enemies of Humanity and to preserve your life even at the cost of my own."

"According to the Code, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of superior command even at the cost of my own. And you are to be our commander, anyway."

"According to the Code, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are to be our commander, after all."

languages.text: 「はい、御{mf|殿|殿}。しかし、この帝国の階層における貴方の立場は彼より高いです。なぜなら、この所にはムニトールム省の承認を受けた称号は存在しないからです。私は神皇帝のしもべとして、人類の敵との戦いで貴方を助け、貴方の命を、たとえ私の命を犠牲にしても守る義務があります。」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. However, your position in the Imperium hierarchy is higher than his, given that no titles here carry the authorisation of the Departmento Munitorum. It is my duty as a servant of the God-Emperor to aid you in the fight against the enemies of Humanity and to preserve your life even at the cost of my own."

traits.locale_text: 「はい、御{mf|殿|殿}。しかし、この帝国の階層における貴方の立場は彼より高いです。なぜなら、この所にはムニトールム省の承認を受けた称号は存在しないからです。私は神皇帝のしもべとして、人類の敵との戦いで貴方を助け、貴方の命を、たとえ私の命を犠牲にしても守る義務があります。」

languages.text: "El Kitabı'na göre Muhafız olarak asli görevim, Tanrı İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârlarına İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı verdikleri mücadelede yardım etmek ve canım pahasına bile olsa üstlerimin hayatını korumaktır. Siz de {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}komutanımız{/d} olacaksınız."
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."

traits.locale_text: "El Kitabı'na göre Muhafız olarak asli görevim, Tanrı İmparator'un sadık hizmetkârlarına İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı verdikleri mücadelede yardım etmek ve canım pahasına bile olsa üstlerimin hayatını korumaktır. Siz de {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}komutanımız{/d} olacaksınız."

languages.text: «Según el manual, mi principal deber como Guardia Imperial es ayudar a los sirvientes fieles del Dios Emperador en la lucha contra los enemigos de la Humanidad y preservar las vidas de los superiores incluso a costa de la mía. Y usted {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}será nuestr{mf|o|a} comandante{/d}, después de todo».
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."

traits.locale_text: «Según el manual, mi principal deber como Guardia Imperial es ayudar a los sirvientes fieles del Dios Emperador en la lucha contra los enemigos de la Humanidad y preservar las vidas de los superiores incluso a costa de la mía. Y usted {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}será nuestr{mf|o|a} comandante{/d}, después de todo».

languages.text: “根据《手册》，我作为卫兵的首要职责，是协助神皇的忠诚仆从对抗人类之敌，哪怕牺牲自己也要保护上级的生命。而您终究会{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}成为我们的指挥官{/d}。”
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."

traits.locale_text: “根据《手册》，我作为卫兵的首要职责，是协助神皇的忠诚仆从对抗人类之敌，哪怕牺牲自己也要保护上级的生命。而您终究会{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}成为我们的指挥官{/d}。”

languages.text: « D'après le Manuel, mon principal devoir en tant que garde impériale est d'aider les fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu à combattre les ennemis de l'humanité et de protéger mes supérieurs au péril de ma vie. Vous serez bientôt {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}notre {mf|commandant|commandante}{/d}, après tout. »
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."

traits.locale_text: « D'après le Manuel, mon principal devoir en tant que garde impériale est d'aider les fidèles serviteurs de l'Empereur-Dieu à combattre les ennemis de l'humanité et de protéger mes supérieurs au péril de ma vie. Vous serez bientôt {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}notre {mf|commandant|commandante}{/d}, après tout. »

languages.text: "Gemäß Handbuch ist meine oberste Pflicht als Soldatin die Unterstützung der treuen Diener des Gottimperators in ihrem Ringen mit den Feinden der Menschheit und die Erhaltung des Lebens eines Vorgesetzten unter Einsatz meines eigenen Lebens. Und Ihr werdet schließlich unser {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}Commander{/d}."
languages.original_text: "According to the Handbook, my primary duty as a Guardsman is to aid the God-Emperor's faithful servants in the struggle against the enemies of Humanity, and to preserve the life of a superior even at the cost of my own. And you are {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}to be our commander{/d}, after all."

traits.locale_text: "Gemäß Handbuch ist meine oberste Pflicht als Soldatin die Unterstützung der treuen Diener des Gottimperators in ihrem Ringen mit den Feinden der Menschheit und die Erhaltung des Lebens eines Vorgesetzten unter Einsatz meines eigenen Lebens. Und Ihr werdet schließlich unser {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_MerovianGoodShooting}Commander{/d}."
